basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Anganwadi Worker and Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha)
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker and Helper Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years | Age Relaxation: | Anganwadi Helper: Up to 10 years relaxation in age limit for selection as Anganwadi Worker and Helper if they have worked as Anganwadi Helper for more than five years in Scheduled Area. Physically Handicapped: 40% or more disability.

qualification.details: Must be enrolled in the survey list of the Anganwadi Centre. If no eligible candidate is available from the survey list area, candidates from the same village area can be considered. If no eligible candidate is available from the village area, candidates from adjoining villages within the Gram Panchayat can be considered. Minimum +2 pass | Experience: Preference may be given to candidates with experience as Anganwadi Helper or ECE Worker.

selection_process: Merit list based on marks obtained in 12th class examination. Additional points for certain categories.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the WCD Odisha Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Helper Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Must be enrolled in the survey list of the Anganwadi Centre. If no eligible candidate is available from the survey list area, candidates from the same village area can be considered. If no eligible candidate is available from the village area, candidates from adjoining villages within the Gram Panchayat can be considered. Minimum +2 pass Experience: Preference may be given to candidates with experience as Anganwadi Helper or ECE Worker.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Anganwadi Helper: Up to 10 years relaxation in age limit for selection as Anganwadi Worker and Helper if they have worked as Anganwadi Helper for more than five years in Scheduled Area. Physically Handicapped: 40% or more disability.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit list based on marks obtained in 12th class examination. Additional points for certain categories.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Helper Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Anganwadi Worker post is 04-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed at least the +2 (12th grade) examination from a recognized board or institution to be eligible for the Anganwadi Worker position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Anganwadi Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Anganwadi Worker post is between 18 years and 35 years. Specific age relaxations are available for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Anganwadi Worker position?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from the marks obtained in the 12th class examination. Additional points may be awarded for specific categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the Anganwadi Worker jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the Anganwadi Worker recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official WCD Odisha website.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the online application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to upload a passport-size photo, signature, Voter ID, Aadhaar Card, educational certificates and marksheets, caste certificate, resident certificate, and other relevant documents as specified.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside the survey list area apply?
faq.answer: Yes, if no eligible candidate is found in the survey list area, candidates from the same village or adjoining villages within the Gram Panchayat can be considered.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or temporary job?
faq.answer: The Anganwadi Worker positions are temporary in nature, as indicated in the job type specified in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official WCD Odisha website.
